provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male Sable Reach captain wearing his version of dressed up — his cleanest stolen shirt, his best trophy armor polished with engine grease, his most impressive weapon displayed prominently, a scrap of silk scarf tied at the throat that he clearly took from someone wealthy, his boots are actually both from the same pair for once, this is as good as it gets in the Reach

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
